message:
fix(pool): clippy fixes and health check acquire loop refinement (asupersync-cl94)

- Add #[allow(clippy::type_complexity)] for AsyncResourceFactory::create
  and health_check_fn field
- Restructure warmup() to drop mutex guard before incrementing counter
- Replace match-based is_healthy with is_none_or
- Rewrite acquire() idle resource loop as while-let for clippy compliance

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
